note: sahadeva+ca legit sandhi split (sahadevaH+ca); but head is particle ca=и, real content Sahadeva survives only in chain
sveta+uzniza = white+turban, real bahuvrihi; gloss белый+тюрбан correct
atula=a+tula (incomparable); split a+ula with ula=jackal is spurious, meaning garbled
triH nizAyAm = thrice in night; split tris+niSA correct but niSA glossed острыми (sharp) instead of night
divyakalpa=divya+kalpa; shattered into div+aj+alpa, meaning invented
cintayitum arhasi = you ought to think; cint+arh roots captured; чейн conveys should+think, размышлениях nominalized
bahu+upakaraNa (noun means/resources); head given as verb root upaskf; help-sense loosely survives
aha+ibhya arbitrary split; дни+подданных incoherent, no real compound
tilaSaH kRta = made into pieces; tilaSas+kf correct, в куски+сделал right
SokAtiga=Soka+atiga (transcended grief); Suc root for member + atiga glossed 'не внемлющем' wrong
subrata=su+vrata (of good vows); svap+ram (sleep+delight) totally spurious
triSiras+man/mata split ok; Trisiras retained but head man=считаю for mata is off
pauravAH patronymic plural, single word; pA+u+u shatter into root+particles, garbage
Sakra-purogama (led by Indra); shattered into 5 members Sak+f+pA+a+gam, nonsense
purI+dvAra = city gate; split pF+i+vf (fill+go+cover) completely wrong
mahAsena real but +as (быть) is ending mis-parsed as root; head 'есть' misrepresents
bhAva+nirvftti; split BU+avani+vft with avani=earth mis-parse of nir-vftti
bhAnavIyAH+ca; over-shattered BA+o+i+ca, head is particle ca=и
Sata+dhAra (hundred-streamed); split SataDA+f with f spurious from -aH ending
avyo vArezu two words (wool, in-filters); split u+vf (particle+cover) unrelated
cApa+hasta (bow-in-hand); mis-split ca+apahasta drops hand; bow sense garbled in chain
na+ucchvas = not breathing; не+дышит correct
rAma(name)+ambA; ram root (delight) wrong for Rama; mother retained
AviH kfNoti = makes manifest; Avis+kf correct, явными+сделал right
prabhAsvant = prabhA+vant suffix (radiant), single derived word; shattered praBA+av+day; сияние survives
asmad+vAkya (from our words); asmad garbled to a+maT; vac=said keeps speech sense, 'our' lost
taijasa=derived from tejas (fiery), single word; split tA+yaj+a nonsense, head a=о
samrAjau dual of samraj (two sovereigns); u spurious dual ending as head=и; king survives
tAM camUm = that army; tA(tad)+camU correct, эти+войско right
paura (citizen) missed entirely; pA+u+as shatter, head 'есть' garbage
mahAn doza = great fault; mah+doza correct, великого+зло right
azwau angAni = eight limbs; anga=limb right but 'eight' mis-lemmatized as aS/az=достигли
mokAjina unclear; muc(release) member dubious, ajina=hide/шкуры plausibly the real head
puNya+saMbhAra+sandhAyin; shattered into 5, only puNya right, rest garbled
druma+varza (tree-rain); mis-split dru+avarza gives avarza=drought, opposite meaning
vfjina+agra both real members; кривое+вначале acceptable (foremost/tip of crookedness)
yoga+samanvita; split yuj+a+anvi; anvi loosely maps to samanvita, yoga sense loose
Aditya+sahita; split a+i+ahita drops sa-, ahita=enemy opposite of sahita=accompanied
unmukhau dual, single word; u spurious dual ending as head=и; unmukha loosely glossed
veda+adhikAra+hIna (deprived of Veda-right); shattered, ahIna=не лишенных is opposite of hIna
